race.comment: The penny has dropped for ROYAL BOMBADIER (1) who has strung three wins together on the bounce and is racing high on confidence of late. Draws the inside alley and can continue the picket fence against this line-up. RUN TO YOU (8) won her maiden over this course and distance last start, getting the verdict by 1.4 lengths. Is lightly raced and has plenty of scope for improvement. Solid top-three hope again. LUDIK (3) is a three-time winner over this distance range and gets a stack of weight relief with the 3kg claim. Top-three credentials. ZOUSAIN GIRL (13) only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a role in the outcome.
